# Will Aesoph - Full LLM Reference

Generated: 2026-04-23
Canonical site URL: https://aesoph.ca

## Site Purpose
Will Aesoph is a Canadian web developer helping businesses with custom websites, technical SEO, and digital growth.

## Service Areas
- Custom website design and development
- Website rebuilds and migration projects
- On-page technical SEO improvements
- Performance optimization and accessibility
- Analytics, lead generation, and web strategy

## Public Pages
- About: https://aesoph.ca/
  Summary: Custom websites, web strategy, and technical SEO from Will Aesoph. View recent work and connect for new projects.
- Work: https://aesoph.ca/work
  Summary: Explore web development projects and case studies spanning website rebuilds, lead generation, and scalable content systems.
- Contact: https://aesoph.ca/contact
  Summary: Start a project with Will Aesoph. Reach out for website development, technical SEO, and digital growth support.

## Case Study Details
- Athens Creek Retirement Lodge
  URL: https://aesoph.ca/work/athens-creek
  Summary: Created a focused retirement-lodge website strategy designed to capture qualified leads quickly and clearly.
- CoreCare
  URL: https://aesoph.ca/work/corecare
  Summary: Delivered a complete website build for CoreCare from design through launch, with a focus on speed and reliability.
- Vancouver Convention Centre
  URL: https://aesoph.ca/work/vancouver-convention-centre
  Summary: Developed reusable templates and content tooling for a 500+ page website to reduce publishing friction.
- PARC Retirement Living
  URL: https://aesoph.ca/work/parcliving
  Summary: Refactored a multi-site platform into a maintainable, version-controlled system while preserving user experience.
